Privacy

Privacy Policy

Lucky Number Guide is designed as an informational website for cultural guides, tools, and product research. We may also use data for site improvement, advertising, affiliate links, contact forms, and digital product delivery.

Information we may collect

When the site is connected to analytics, advertising, affiliate links, forms, or paid products, it may collect basic usage data, referral information, device information, and information you voluntarily submit through a contact form or checkout flow.

How information is used

Information may be used to improve content, measure traffic, respond to messages, prevent abuse, process orders, deliver digital products, and understand which guides, tools, or product pages are useful to visitors.

Advertising and affiliate links

This site may display ads or include affiliate links. Affiliate links may earn a commission at no extra cost to the visitor. Advertising and affiliate partners may use cookies or similar technologies according to their own policies.

Contact

For privacy questions, contact guan@shanyuegroup.com.

Lucky Number Guide

Find lucky numbers, number meanings, and simple cultural patterns for everyday choices.

Lucky Numbers Guide publishes practical guides, tools, resources, and FAQ for readers.
